memoryArtifacts.description:
Brief Life History of William le Fleming
William "le Fleming" Douglas was a medieval nobleman living in Clydesdale, an area under the control of the King of the Scots.

zh.Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Kersdale of Moray於1152年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安時，她的父親Kersdale De Moray21歲，母親Joanna De Moray28歲。她於1172年之前與William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1238年享年86歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭Forfarshire。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Kersdale of Moray于1152年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安时，她的父亲Kersdale De Moray21岁，母亲Joanna De Moray28岁。她于1172年之前与William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1238年享年86岁，埋葬在苏格兰Forfarshire。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Kersdale of Moray was born in 1152, in Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Kersdale De Moray, was 21 and her mother, Joanna De Moray, was 28. She married William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas before 1172, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1238, at the age of 86, and was buried in Forfarshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Kersdale of Moray est née en 1152, à Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Kersdale De Moray, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joanna De Moray, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas avant 1172, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1238, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Forfarshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Kersdale of Moray 1152 in Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Kersdale De Moray 21 und ihre Mutter Joanna De Moray 28. Sie hat vor 1172 in Scotland William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1238 im Alter von 86 Jahren und wurde in Forfarshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Kersdale of Moray è nata il nel 1152 nel Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, Kersdale De Moray, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Joanna De Moray, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas prima del 1172, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1238, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Forfarshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Kersdale of Morayが1152年にスコットランドミドロスアンで生まれた時，父Kersdale De Morayは21歳，母Joanna De Morayは28歳であった。1172年以前にスコットランドでWilliam le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1238年に86歳で死去し，スコットランドForfarshireにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Kersdale of Moray(이)가 1152년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Kersdale De Moray(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna De Moray(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1172년 이전 스컷랜드에서 William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1238년 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 Forfarshire에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Kersdale of Moray nasceu em 1152, em Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Kersdale De Moray, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joanna De Moray, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas antes 1172, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1238, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Forfarshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Kersdale of Moray родилась в 1152 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Kersdale De Moray было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joanna De Moray, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas перед 1172 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1238 г. в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности Forfarshire, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Kersdale of Moray nació en 1152, en Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Kersdale De Moray, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Joanna De Moray, tenía 28 años. Se casó con William le Fleming Douglas I Laird Of Douglas antes de 1172, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1238, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Forfarshire, Scotland.
